creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Update port: x11-wm/afterstep-i18n

This port has two serious problems.
    1. AfterStep-1.0.tar.gz is unfetchable.
         Because MASTER_SITE url has changed.
    2. The md5 value(files/md5) for unofficial-I18N.98Feb27.tar.gz
       is not right.

Thank you.
--- shige
